top_categories.workout_context: 139ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before July.
At Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
10,400ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre's paved Alpine roads with iconic unpaved summit forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 75 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre. Train it until it feels boring.
75 miles on paved Alpine roads with iconic unpaved summit burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
10,400ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Base fitness for Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
Low-cadence force work for 10,400ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre’s 75 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Granfondo Sestriere — Colle delle Finestre requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on paved alpine roads with iconic unpaved summit to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Over Under to prepare you for 75 miles of paved alpine roads with iconic unpaved summit in Cesana Torinese, Piedmont, Italy.
